response:
Sec. 1  
peanuts are a type of food that contains proteins which can trigger allergic reactions in some individuals  
the body of a person who is allergic to peanuts cannot tolerate the proteins in peanuts  
allergies are caused by the immune system reacting to substances in the environment  
the immune system of someone allergic to peanuts cannot handle the proteins in peanuts  
peanuts are a common food item that is found in many places  
the presence of peanuts in the environment can trigger an allergic reaction in some people  

Sec. 2  
the allergic reaction to peanuts can occur even if the person is not directly exposed to peanuts  
the reaction can happen when the person is in an environment where peanuts are present  
the immune system of someone allergic to peanuts can react to peanuts even in small amounts  
the reaction can occur in the form of hives or difficulty breathing  
the allergic reaction to peanuts can be severe and requires immediate medical attention
